tokensDesc: Token usage across all responses including skills, agents, etc. (transcript-based, collected since first Claude Code session)
costFormulaDesc: Reference cost converted at Anthropic API token pricing (per 1M tokens, USD). Claude Code CLI is subscription-based (Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise) and not billed per token — this estimate is unrelated to actual subscription charges.
costFormulaDetail: Cost = (Input × input price + Output × output price + Cache Read × cache read price + Cache Write × cache write price) ÷ 1,000,000
costCardNote: Based on Anthropic API token pricing (not actual CLI subscription billing)
budgetDesc: Set spending thresholds to track API-equivalent cost against your budget. Stored locally in your browser — click ⚙ to configure.
tokenByContextDesc: Tokens attributed to the most recently active individual skill, agent, or tool
taskCategoryDesc: Token usage grouped into higher-level task categories from skills, agents, and tools
responseLatencyDesc: Time from prompt submission to first response (human→assistant interval)
sessionTopListHint: Click a row to view session details
hourlyDistDesc: Token usage by hour of day (24h)
promptStatsDesc: User input prompt length and frequency analysis (estimated by character count)
activityDesc: Daily activity combining skills, agents, commands, and MCP calls (transcript-based, collected since first Claude Code session)
unusedCleanupTipDetail: {0} items are configured but unused in this period. Disabling unused plugins or removing unused agents/MCP servers reduces context loading at session start.
dailyTrendDesc: Total daily calls combining skills, agents, and commands
unusedAgentRec: Unused agent for {0} days: {1} — consider removing
flowSubtext: How a user prompt flows through the harness
fileTreeSub: File tree of the harness configuration
structureSub: Component interaction flow and file tree
helpUpdateCaveat: ⚠️ If the update is not applied, the plugin system may be using a cached marketplace. Run git -C "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}/plugins/marketplaces/oh-my-hi" pull origin main first, then reinstall.
helpParamDefault: Parse and generate data, build web-ui, then open automatically in browser
helpParamDataOnly:
Lightweight data collection — parse changed files and update data.js (skip full dashboard build).
💡 Bookmark the dashboard and refresh anytime to see the latest data.
helpParamEnableAuto:
Auto-collect data on every session end (registers Stop hook).
💡 Once enabled, just refresh the bookmarked page — data is collected automatically.
helpParamUpdate: Check for new versions and update the plugin
helpParamPaths: Build with only the specified project paths
helpConfigFilesDesc: Reads CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md (global/project), settings.json, and settings.local.json. Extracts content and statistics.
helpSkillsDesc: Parses {{configDir}}/skills/*/SKILL.md and plugins/cache/**/SKILL.md. Extracts name, description, version, argument-hint, allowed-tools from YAML frontmatter. Local skills take priority over plugin skills with the same name.
helpAgentsDesc: Parses {{configDir}}/agents/*.md. Extracts name, description, model from frontmatter. changelog.md is excluded.
helpPluginsDesc: Reads installed plugin list from plugins/installed_plugins.json. Checks enabled status via enabledPlugins in settings.json. Looks up author info from marketplace.json.
helpHooksDesc: Parses the hooks section of settings.json. Groups by event (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, etc.) and matcher, then aggregates commands.
helpMemoryDesc: Parses {{configDir}}/projects/*/memory/*.md. Extracts name, description, type from frontmatter. MEMORY.md (index file) is excluded.
helpMcpServersDesc: Reads mcpServers from .claude.json and mcp.json. Environment variable values are masked (***) for security; only key names are exposed.
helpRulesDesc: Reads {{configDir}}/rules/*.md and principles/*.md. Treats entire file content as body without frontmatter parsing.
helpScopesDesc: Global scope (default) + auto-detected from projects/ subdirectories. Extracts the cwd field from .jsonl files to find actual project paths. Paths that no longer exist are filtered out.
helpTokensDesc: Parses projects/*/*.jsonl (transcripts). Extracts input/output/cache tokens from assistant message usage fields. Attributed by model, session, and active context (skill/agent/MCP/tool).
helpPromptStatsDesc: Estimates character count (charLen) of human messages from transcripts. Calculates short (≤100 chars) and long (≥500 chars) prompt ratios.
helpLatencyDesc: Measures time difference between human→assistant messages. Only 0–600,000ms (10 min) range is valid. Tracked per session.
helpActivityDesc: Aggregates skill/agent/command/MCP calls by day and visualizes as a heatmap.
helpCommandsDesc: Extracts user commands starting with / from history.jsonl. Built-in commands (clear, help, model, etc. — 20 types) and file paths are excluded.
helpCustomCommandsDesc: Parses {{configDir}}/commands/*.md. Extracts description and allowed-tools from frontmatter.
helpTeamsDesc: Parses {{configDir}}/teams/*/config.json. Extracts team name, description, and member count.
helpPlansDesc: Parses {{configDir}}/plans/*.md. Lists execution plan documents by filename.
cacheTipLowHitDetail: Cache hit rate is {0}%. Consider running longer sessions — cache benefits accumulate over sustained conversations.
cacheTipGoodDetail: Cache hit rate is {0}%. Your usage pattern is cost-efficient with strong cache reuse.
cacheTipHighCreationDetail: Cache is being written more than read, suggesting frequent context resets. Cache benefits accrue most in long-running sessions.
cacheTipNoSessionDetail: {0}% of sessions show no cache reads. Longer, continuous sessions improve cache hit rates.
insightCacheDetail: Of total input: cache read {0}%, cache creation {1}%, fresh input {2}%.
insightCacheHighHit: High cache hit rate indicates excellent cost efficiency.
insightCacheLowHit: Low cache hit rate. Conversations may be short or context changes frequently.
insightRespDetail: Output to fresh input ratio: {0}x (Input {1} → Output {2}).
insightRespHighRatio: High output ratio. Pattern indicates frequent code generation or lengthy responses.
insightCostDetail: Total estimated cost: {0} (based on Anthropic official pricing).
insightReqDetail: {0} total requests, avg {1} tokens per request.
insightReqHighTokens: High tokens per request. Pattern suggests tasks with large context windows.
insightNoArgHint: {0} has no argument-hint. Add one to its frontmatter to guide argument input.
insightUnusedAgents:
{0} unused agents for {1} days: {2}.
Remove their definition files to reduce context loading.
insightTopAgents: Top agents: {0}. {1} accounts for {2}% of all agent calls.
insightAgentGenericAdvice: Analyze this agent's recurring call patterns and define frequently performed tasks as dedicated skills or rules/principles.
insightOtherAgentTypes: {0} other agent type(s) were also used.
insightPluginDetail: Only {0} plugin skills are actively used from {1} active plugins.
insightPluginAdvice: Disabling unused plugins reduces context loading at session start.
insightMemAdviceFeedback: Many feedback memories. Check for duplicates or items already reflected in CLAUDE.md.
insightMemAdviceProject: Many project memories. Clean up completed projects or outdated status to keep context accurate.
insightMemAdviceUser: Many user memories. Review for outdated roles or preferences and consolidate.
insightMemAdviceReference: Many reference memories. Verify that external links and resources are still valid.
agentAdviceExplore: Frequently used for codebase exploration. Add commonly searched paths to CLAUDE.md, or create dedicated skills for recurring patterns (e.g., "find API endpoints", "trace component structure").
agentAdviceGeneral: Used for various tasks as a general-purpose agent. Analyze recurring patterns and create dedicated agent types with optimized prompts and tool permissions.
agentAdvicePlan: Frequently used for planning. Create project-specific plan template skills for faster, consistent plan generation.
configDescSettings: Shared configuration file for Claude Code. Defines core harness behavior including hooks, plugin activation, permissions, and environment variables. Tracked by Git for team-wide sharing.
configDescSettingsLocal: Local-only configuration file, not tracked by Git. Stores settings that should not be shared: personal API tokens, local-specific paths, device-specific preferences. Same structure as settings.json — overlapping keys here take precedence.
configDescClaudeMd: Top-level instruction file for the project. Automatically loaded into context in every session. Defines code conventions, work principles, and project structure.
configDescAgentsMd: Additional instruction file for subagents. Customizes the behavior of subagents spawned via the Agent tool.
updateBannerMsg: ⚡ New data detected. Refresh the page to see the latest data.
partialBannerMsg: Showing last 7 days. Full data is loading in the background…
catDescSkills: Skills are reusable prompt templates invoked via /commands. Provided from the skills/ directory or plugins, each SKILL.md defines name, description, and argument hints in its frontmatter. They can also be auto-invoked via the Skill tool during conversations.
catDescAgents: Agents are subprocesses that autonomously handle complex tasks. Defined as markdown in the agents/ directory, they specify model (haiku/sonnet/opus), available tools, and domain expertise. Dispatched via the Agent tool, they run in independent contexts.
catDescRules: Rules are instruction files that control Claude's behavior. Stored as markdown files in {{configDir}}/rules/, they are automatically loaded into context in every session. Unlike CLAUDE.md, they allow separation of concerns into individual files.
catDescPrinciples: Principles share the same structure as Rules but define higher-level guidelines applied across the team. Stored in {{configDir}}/principles/, they collect reusable directives such as coding standards, review criteria, and automation policies.
catDescHooks: Hooks are shell commands that run automatically on specific Claude Code events (pre/post tool use, notifications, etc.). Defined in settings.json, they are event-driven and not invoked manually.
catDescMemory: Memory is a file-based persistence system across conversations. Organized by type (user, feedback, project, reference), with MEMORY.md as the index. Automatically loaded in every session to maintain context.
catDescMcpServers: MCP Servers connect external tools to Claude Code. Defined in .claude.json, they enable integration with browser automation, n8n workflows, Obsidian, and other external systems.
catDescPlugins: Plugins are packages bundling skills, agents, and hooks for distribution. Installable from marketplaces or custom-built, controlled via enabledPlugins in settings.json.
catDescConfigFiles: Config files are core files defining Claude Code behavior. Includes CLAUDE.md (project instructions), AGENTS.md (subagent instructions), settings.json (shared config), and settings.local.json (local-only config).
hookDescPreToolUse: Called just before a tool executes. Can allow, deny, or modify the tool call.
hookDescPostToolUse: Called after a tool completes successfully. Used for validation or post-processing.
hookDescNotification: Called when Claude sends a notification. Commonly used for notification sounds.
hookDescStop: Called when Claude finishes responding. Can force continuation or trigger follow-up actions.
hookDescSessionStart: Called when a new session starts or resumes. Used for environment init and context injection.
hookDescUserPromptSubmit: Called right after user submits a prompt. Can block prompts or inject additional context.
hookDescPostToolUseFailure: Called after a tool execution fails. Used for error handling or recovery.
hookDescSubagentStop: Called when a subagent completes. Can validate results or force continued execution.
hookDescSessionEnd: Called when a session ends. Used for cleanup or logging.
hookDescInstructionsLoaded: Called after CLAUDE.md and rules files are loaded.
hookDescPermissionRequest: Called when a permission dialog is shown. Can auto-allow or deny.
hookDescConfigChange: Called when a settings file changes.
hookDescPreCompact: Called just before context compaction begins.
